name: EnvironmentsObserver
summary: This class is abstract. To implement this observer, create a Ruby class of this type, override the desired methods, and add an instance of the observer to the Environment object. This observer interface is implemented to react to Environment events.

methods.name: onEnvironmentAdd
methods.summary: The #onEnvironmentAdd method is called whenever an environment is added to the Sketchup::Environments.
methods.remarks: The #onEnvironmentAdd method is called whenever an environment is added to the Sketchup::Environments.

methods.name: onEnvironmentChange
methods.summary: The #onEnvironmentChange method is called whenever the environment properties are changed.
methods.remarks: The #onEnvironmentChange method is called whenever the environment properties are changed.

methods.name: onEnvironmentRemove
methods.summary: The #onEnvironmentRemove method is called whenever an environment is removed from the Sketchup::Environments.
methods.remarks: The #onEnvironmentRemove method is called whenever an environment is removed from the Sketchup::Environments.

methods.name: onEnvironmentSetCurrent
methods.summary: The #onEnvironmentSetCurrent method is called whenever the current environment is changed.
methods.remarks: The #onEnvironmentSetCurrent method is called whenever the current environment is changed.
